name: Brutal Fate
title: Effigy

abilities.name: Insignificant
abilities.text: This model cannot declare the Interact action and is ignored for strategies and schemes.

abilities.name: Quick Study
abilities.text: This model gains the keywords of the friendly leader.

actions.name: Brutal Takedown
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If this attack receives a raise, an ally may declare a /// action targeting the same model.

triggers.name: Brutal Fate
triggers.text: This model must be engaging an enemy model and cannot have a Summon token. Replace this model with the Brutal Fate, Emissary, then this model heals 6.

actions.name: Cleansing Shield
actions.effects: Remove up to one token from the target. The target gains a Shielded token.

extraction_notes: Keywords section shows only 'Unique, Effigy, Versatile' with no keywords after the bullet point separator
